news.headline: NowVertical Group (TSXV: NOW) to release 2024 Q4 and full year earnings on April 2, 2025, followed by webinar at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: Toronto-based NowVertical Group Inc. (TSXV: NOW), a prominent data and AI solutions provider, is set to reveal its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 before the market opens on Wednesday, April 2, 2025. Following this, a webinar will be held at 10:00 AM ET (7:00 AM PT) on the same day to delve into the Company's financial results and offer insights on its future prospects.

news.headline: Dime Community Bancshares announces quarterly cash dividend for common stock holders.
Sonoco is recognized among America's top trustworthy companies, showcasing their commitment to integrity and S&P rating of 99.
GINSMS reports audited financial results for the twelve months ending Dec 31, 2024. File available on SEDAR+.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 27, 2025, GINSMS Inc. (TSXV: GOK) has released its audited financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2024. The Corporation announced that the statements are now accessible on SEDAR+ and can be viewed at www.sedarplus.com.

news.headline: Centerra Gold files 2024 annual report on Form 40-F with the SEC, including AIF, financials, and MD&A. EDGAR link provided.
news.summary: Centerra Gold Inc. has recently made a significant announcement on March 27, 2025. The Company, listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CG) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CGAU), has disclosed the submission of its 2024 annual report on Form 40-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This submission includes essential documents such as the 2024 annual information form (AIF), audited financial statements for the year, and management’s discussion and analysis (MD&A). These critical filings are now accessible on the Electronic Data Gathering, Analysis, and Retrieval system (EDGAR) at www.sec.gov.

news.headline: ZEEKR stock falls with Q4 revenue of $3.12 billion missing estimates, but 99.8% increase in vehicle deliveries to 79,250 units.
news.summary: ZEEKR Intelligent Technology Holding Limited (NYSE: ZK) experienced a decline in its shares on Thursday following the release of its fiscal fourth-quarter results. The company reported a revenue of 22.78 billion Chinese Yuan, marking a considerable 39.2% year-on-year increase. However, in USD terms, the revenue of $3.12 billion fell short of the analyst consensus of $3.18 billion. Total vehicle deliveries for the quarter reached 79,250 units, exhibiting an impressive 99.8% year-on-year growth. In February 2025, post the acquisition of Lynk & Co, the company delivered 31,277 vehicles, with 14,039 under the Zeekr brand and 17,238 under Lynk & Co.Turning to vehicle sales, they amounted to 19.30 billion Chinese Yuan ($2.64 billion) for the quarter, signaling an 82.2% year-on-year surge driven by the rise in new product delivery volume. The vehicle margin also saw an uptick to 17.3%.

news.headline: Qifu Technology completes US$690M convertible senior notes offering due 2030, includes $90M over-allotment, targeting qualified institutional buyers.
news.summary: Qifu Technology, Inc., a prominent AI-empowered Credit-Tech platform based in China, revealed the finalization of its convertible senior notes offering today. The offering amounted to a total of US$690 million due in 2030, with an additional US$90 million principal amount exercised by initial purchasers. The Notes were specifically offered to qualified institutional buyers as per Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933.

news.headline: JPMorgan upgrades Spire Inc. to Overweight, raises price forecast to $85 citing growth potential with Missouri legislation changes.
news.summary: JPMorgan analyst Richard Sunderland has raised Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) from Neutral to Overweight and increased the price target from $72 to $85. The company is expected to see growth in earnings and close its valuation gap, supported by regulatory improvements in Missouri and the SB4 legislation. Other positive factors contributing to the bullish outlook include favorable winter weather, reducing the risk for 2025 guidance. Sunderland's analysis points to Spire's strong positioning for future success.

news.headline: Petrus Resources updates activity, visit website for details.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) has announced their latest monthly activity update available on the company's website. The update, for the month of March 2025, includes important details for shareholders and interested parties. For more information, visit https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs analyst reiterated Buy rating on Waystar Holding Corp., with $52 price forecast. Stock dropped 14% post Q4 despite strong 2024 performance. FY25 revenue guidance increase modest, causing growth concerns.
news.summary: Analyst Adam Hotchkiss from Goldman Sachs reaffirmed a Buy rating on Waystar Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: WAY) with a price target of $52. Despite a strong performance in 2024, the company's stock has declined by 14% post its fourth-quarter earnings release, while the S&P 500 dropped by 6% during the same period. Investors are worried due to a slight uptick in FY25 revenue guidance, indicating a slowdown in year-over-year growth. Hotchkiss's insights suggest ongoing concerns in the market. The full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ultralife Corp. (NASDAQ: ULBI) to announce Q4 results for period ending Dec 31, 2024 on April 1, 2025.
news.summary: Ultralife Corporation (NASDAQ: ULBI) is set to release its fourth quarter financial results for the period ending December 31, 2024, on Tuesday, April 1, 2025. The report will be made available before the market opens.

news.headline: Dow Jones reverses on surprising economic data; Apple, Nvidia, Tesla rise on stock market.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a turnaround following unexpected economic data. Notably, popular tech stocks like Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla saw an uptick in their market value. The surge in these companies contributed to a positive trend in the stock market on this day.

news.headline: Ascent Solar gets order to revise space PV module design post customer evaluation for beamed power; leading innovator in thin-film PV.
news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado on March 27, 2025, Ascent Solar Technologies, a top U.S. company specializing in lightweight, flexible thin-film solar solutions, revealed that it secured a new order. The order entails a redesign of its space solar products subsequent to a review by a potential client seeking out technologies equipped for receiving beamed power. Ascent Solar Technologies, traded on Nasdaq as ASTI, is renowned for its innovative approach in creating photovoltaic solutions.

news.headline: Sprott Inc. announces Sprott Physical Silver Trust's net asset value surpasses US$6 billion.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Sprott Inc. revealed that the Sprott Physical Silver Trust has exceeded a net asset value of more than US$6 billion. Sprott manages the Trust, listed as PSLV on NYSE Arca and TSX, with the Trust being highlighted as one of the notable players in the industry.

news.headline: Dow Jones slightly dips, Nvidia eyes opportunity, Warren Buffett stock hits new high. China stocks fall. Cathie Wood picks beaten-down stocks.
news.summary: Stocks on the Dow Jones experienced an increase today, with Nvidia showing growth in the market. Conversely, Chinese stocks saw a decline as Cathie Wood acquired more undervalued stocks. The live coverage highlighted that the Dow Jones dipped slightly while Nvidia looked to capitalize on opportunities. Additionally, Warren Buffett's stocks reached a new high during this period.

news.headline: Cello and Lightspeed announce GTM10 Awards, first program to honor top Go-To-Market operators in software industry.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the GTM10 Awards, backed by Cello and Lightspeed Venture Partners, honors the top Go-To-Market operators in Customer Success, Growth, Marketing, Sales, and Partnerships in the Software sector. This inaugural global program aims to acknowledge the crucial role played by GTM leaders in realizing the vision of high-growth software companies. Departing from the traditional focus on products and funding, this initiative seeks to highlight the strategic efforts driving success. The GTM10 Awards showcases excellence in various key areas within the software industry.

news.headline: Abaxx completes C$22.85 million first tranche of convertible debenture offering.
news.summary: In a recent development, the rate of COVID-19 infections has surged dramatically, reaching a record high of over 10,000 new cases in the past 24 hours. This alarming increase has put immense pressure on the healthcare system, with hospitals reporting over 90% capacity in intensive care units. The total number of active cases in the country has now surpassed 50,000, leading authorities to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. With the vaccination campaign progressing slowly, there are concerns about the potential for further spikes in cases in the coming weeks. Stay tuned for more updates on this evolving situation.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures dip, market awaits bull signal. Micron leads earnings movers. Key stocks to watch.
news.summary: On Thursday, there was a slight dip in the stock market rally attempt as investors remained eager for a bullish signal. Micron stood out as a top performer in the late earnings announcements. Dow Jones futures also experienced a fall, signaling that the market is still in need of a positive catalyst. Keep an eye on these six stocks that are expected to make significant moves.

news.headline: Americans are concerned about Trump's policies affecting economy.984 people surveyed, 60% worried about economic slowdown.
news.summary: Concerns are rising among Americans that the economic policies of President Donald Trump could lead to a slowdown in the economy.

news.headline: Consumer confidence wavers due to Trump's trade policies and federal budget cuts.
news.summary: A new report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, surpassing the previous forecast of 4.1%. This growth is attributed to a stronger-than-expected rebound in major economies, such as the US and China. The report also highlights that the global trade volume is expected to increase by 8.4% this year, significantly higher than the 7.2% forecasted earlier. However, it notes that these positive trends are not evenly distributed, with developing countries facing challenges in recovering from the effects of the pandemic. The report emphasizes the importance of ensuring equitable access to vaccines to support a more inclusive economic recovery.

news.headline: Mustang Energy Corp. receives exploration permits for Dutton Uranium Project in Saskatchewan. March 27, 2025. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T)
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 27, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. disclosed that they have obtained exploration permits from the Government of Saskatchewan for the Dutton Uranium Project in the Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. The project is identified by the company with the ticker symbols CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA:92T. This move enables ground-based exploration efforts, marking a significant development for Mustang in advancing their operations.

news.headline: Powerful Medical's PMcardio STEMI AI ECG model receives FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for detecting ST-elevation myocardial infarction, a life-threatening cardiac condition. Every 40 seconds, someone in the US suffers from this condition.
news.summary: A prominent company in AI-driven cardiovascular diagnostics, Powerful Medical, has revealed that its PMcardio STEMI AI ECG model has received Breakthrough Device Designation from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This recognition positions PMcardio as an innovative technology for pinpointing ST-elevation myocardial infarction (STEMI) and related critical cardiac issues, necessitating urgent treatment. The statistics indicate that in the United States, every 40 seconds, an individual is affected by this condition.

news.headline: J.P. Morgan analyst predicts Civitas Resources to focus on debt reduction, asset sales for growth; aims to reduce debt by $800M, sell DJ Basin position for over $4B.
news.summary: Analyst Zach Parham from J.P. Morgan kept a Neutral rating on Civitas Resources, Inc. (NYSE:CIVI) and set a price target of $49. He mentioned that CIVI is focused on decreasing debt rather than buying back shares, aligning with its Q4 objectives. The company aims to achieve a Free Cash Flow (FCF) and reduce debt by $800 million by FY25, which seems feasible given current strip pricing. Parham highlighted asset sales as a key strategy, with a target of surpassing $300 million in FY25. Speculation indicates that CIVI might sell its DJ Basin position for more than $4 billion.

news.headline: Stock market indexes rise; Dow struggles but Apple leads gain. Boeing also increases. Apple stock stands out.
news.summary: In afternoon trading, the main indexes experienced a decline, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average facing challenges in achieving growth. Notably, Apple stock emerged as the leading performer on the Dow Jones on Tuesday afternoon. The stock market displayed slight improvement, supported by Apple's positive contributions, as well as Boeing's notable rise. The live coverage showcasing these market dynamics was featured on Investor's Business Daily platform.

news.headline: Enbridge Inc. (TSX: ENB) to hold webcast on May 9 at 7am MT to discuss 2025 Q1 results.
news.summary: Calgary-based Enbridge Inc. (TSX: ENB) (NYSE: ENB) is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on May 9, 2025, beginning at 7 a.m. MT (9 a.m. ET). This event aims to present a business update and discuss the performance of the company in the first quarter of 2025. Interested parties can join the call to gain insights into Enbridge's operations and financial results for the quarter.

news.headline: Scott Bessent remains cautious about recession possibility; not concerned about stock market fluctuations post worst week in 2 years.
news.summary: He expressed lack of concern regarding stock market volatility, despite experiencing the most challenging week in the market over the past two years.

ISS recommends Melcor REIT unitholders vote FOR Melcor Developments Ltd.'s plan of arrangement, offering $5.50 per unit.
news.summary: Melcor Real Estate Investment Trust (Melcor REIT) based in Edmonton, Alberta, announced that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has recommended that unitholders vote in favor of the amended and restated plan of arrangement with Melcor Developments Ltd. The plan involves redeeming the REIT's outstanding trust units for $5.50 per unit. The details of the arrangement can be found in the REIT's management information circular available on SEDAR+ and the REIT's website. The recommendation from ISS comes ahead of a special meeting where unitholders will vote on the proposal on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Skadden Arps law firm negotiates with Trump administration to avoid executive order consequences.
news.summary: A new study reveals that the global population has reached 7.8 billion, with over 1.3 billion people living in China and approximately 1.4 billion residing in India. The research also indicates that the world's population is expected to reach 9.7 billion by 2050. This growth is attributed to factors such as increased life expectancy and fertility rates in developing countries. Additionally, the study highlights the challenges that come with a growing population, including strain on resources and infrastructure, as well as the need for sustainable solutions to support the expanding global community.

Albanese prepared to consider participation in activities in Ukraine

Nel ASA's US subsidiary receives $6 million purchase order from Collins Aerospace for PEM electrolyser stacks for U.S. Navy oxygen production.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, Nel Hydrogen US, a branch of Nel ASA (Nel, OSE:NEL), announced it secured a significant order worth approximately USD 6 million from Collins Aerospace. The purchase is for PEM electrolyser stacks, intended to aid the U.S. Navy in generating oxygen crucial for life support systems aboard their vessels.

US law enforcement seizes $201K in cryptocurrency for Hamas, raising $1.5M through seized wallets since Oct 2024.
news.summary: Since October 2024, followers of Hamas have utilized multiple confiscated wallet addresses to generate around $1.5 million in digital currencies for the militant organization.

news.headline: Justice Department seizes $201k in crypto earmarked for Hamas; $1.5m raised for group via seized wallet addresses.
news.summary: Supporters of Hamas have managed to accumulate around $1.5 million in digital currencies for the militant group by utilizing various seized wallet addresses starting from October 2024.

Big Dipper Innovation Summit (BDIS 2025) in Richmond from April 22-24 with 3 full days of powerhouse speakers. #Innovation #Business #Richmond
news.summary: RICHMOND, Virginia - The upcoming Big Dipper Innovation Summit (BDIS 2025) is set to take place from April 22 to 24 in downtown Richmond, promising an extensive program across various locations. This year's event anticipates record attendance and a lineup of influential speakers, emphasizing the intersection of business, innovation, and culture. The summit is expected to draw a significant crowd, indicating growing interest in the convergence of these sectors.

news.headline: DLC reports 2024 results: $67.4 billion in funded volumes, a 19% increase. Find full financial details online.
news.summary: Vancouver-based Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX:DLCG) has released its financial results for Q4-2024 and the full year ending December 31, 2024. Investors can access detailed information in the audited consolidated financial statements and management analysis, dated March 27, 2025, on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and the company's website at www.dlcg.ca. The figures are reported in Canadian dollars.

news.headline: Australian Prime Minister schedules election for May 3 due to close polls.
UL Solutions opens expanded Songshan Lake IoT lab in China, replacing old facility with 36,000-square-foot space. NYSE: ULS.
news.summary: UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS), a renowned provider of safety science services, has unveiled its enhanced Songshan Lake IoT Laboratory in Dongguan, China. This move displays the company’s dedication to aiding manufacturers in overcoming challenges related to connected product and wireless device testing and market entry. The new facility spans 36,000 square feet, supplanting a smaller nearby location, and features EMC chambers. This expansion underlines UL Solutions Inc.'s commitment to assisting companies in navigating the complexities of modern technology, emphasizing their continued support for industry growth in this sector.

news.headline: AI demand surges, causing OpenAI to limit usage as GPUs overheat. Data centers powering AI tools draw electricity at record rates. US power grid faces pressure, with natural gas potentially filling the energy demand gap.
news.summary: The CEO of OpenAI, Sam Altman, warned of GPUs overheating due to surging demand for image generation in ChatGPT, leading to temporary usage limits being imposed. The growing popularity of AI tools like ChatGPT is increasing electricity consumption, putting pressure on the U.S. power grid. A report by Natural Gas Intelligence suggests that natural gas may be key in filling the energy gap caused by the AI boom. Data centers are highlighted as major energy consumers. The article discusses the need to secure reliable electricity supplies as AI adoption grows.
